title: Dashboard Loading Issues
solution:
1. Check Tableau Server status
2. Clear browser cache
3. Reduce dashboard complexity
4. Contact IT if server issues persist

title: Database Connection Errors
solution:
1. Verify VPN connection
2. Check database credentials
3. Test connection from Tableau Desktop
4. Contact DBA team if connectivity issues persist

title: Data Refresh Problems
solution:
1. Check data source connection
2. Verify refresh schedule
3. Review extract logs
4. Manually trigger refresh if needed

title: Visualization Errors
solution:
1. Check calculated fields
2. Verify data types
3. Review filters and parameters
4. Recreate visualization if corrupted
